claims.claim: The selected candidate is a redacted-real local operational trace.
claims.safe_public_wording: The proof uses one redacted-real local operational trace.
claims.risk_if_overstated: Could imply public-source provenance or independent external validation not present in this run.

claims.claim: The candidate-risk gate passed with pond-backed Inside Voice runtime participation.
claims.safe_public_wording: The candidate-risk gate returned adapter_status pond_backed, contribution_grade strong, and empty gate_failures.
claims.risk_if_overstated: Could imply broader runtime readiness beyond this candidate-risk gate.

claims.claim: Visible-only replay left every required probe partial or unresolved.
claims.safe_public_wording: In this trace, visible-only replay did not fully reconstruct any required probe.
claims.risk_if_overstated: Could imply visible-only replay is generally insufficient.

claims.claim: Full-lineage replay reconstructed every required probe for this fixture.
claims.safe_public_wording: In this single trace, full-lineage replay reconstructed all eight required probes.

claims.claim: Survivable lineage materially improved replay adequacy in this single trace.
claims.safe_public_wording: In this single real-trace replay run, full-lineage replay reconstructed operational probes that visible-only replay left partial or unresolved, using verified pond-backed Inside Voice runtime participation and deterministic lineage artifacts.
claims.risk_if_overstated: Could become a global superiority claim if detached from single-trace scope.

claims.claim: The replay-adequacy advisory call produced a claim-boundary warning.
claims.safe_public_wording: A replay-adequacy advisory warning was recorded and used to keep final wording bounded.
claims.risk_if_overstated: Could be misread as invalidating the candidate-risk gate, which passed separately.

claims.safe_public_wording: Additional independent real-trace replay runs are required before stronger claims.
claims.risk_if_overstated: Could imply validation breadth that this proof does not provide.

claims.claim: No global superiority, AGI, consciousness, black-box-solved, or target-system defect claim is made.
claims.safe_public_wording: The proof is bounded to a single redacted-real replay comparison.
claims.risk_if_overstated: Boundary claims must not be converted into positive system capability claims.
